metadata.description: Repo-local Claude Code marketplace that ports selected OpenAI-curated bundles for web apps, iOS apps, and browser games.

plugins.name: build-web-apps
plugins.description: Claude-native port of the OpenAI-curated build-web-apps bundle for frontend delivery, Vercel deployment, Stripe guidance, Supabase/Postgres practices, and web UI review.

plugins.name: build-ios-apps
plugins.description: Claude-native port of the OpenAI-curated build-ios-apps bundle for SwiftUI architecture, refactors, performance audits, and simulator-led debugging.

plugins.name: game-studio
plugins.description: Claude-native port of the OpenAI-curated game-studio bundle for browser-game planning, 2D and 3D implementation, asset pipelines, and playtesting.
